transcript.text:
"Did they really give permission?!"
(Everyone who knew here was surprised) We didn't know... We didn't expect it...!
It's famous
(Day or night, people visit here)
All by yourself?!
Ah, impressive!
(Tzuyang visits Nagoya's number one place) Once Koreans get to know this place,
(where the food is well-suited to Koreans) they will surely love it
(Episode 7, Miso Katsu) (The last episode in Nagoya)
Hello, everyone!
Today, in Nagoya,
I came to eat Miso Katsu
Among Nagoya's many renowned cuisines,
their miso stands out
A variety of dishes are made from it,
with Miso Katsu being one of the most popular

So here I am
(A local hot spot!) a local from Nagoya
(A must-visit place) recommended this place
Apparently, residents love this restaurant
There’s usually a long line, day or night,
so I didn’t expect they would allow filming
(Thank you for the permission!) Fortunately, they accepted our request,
and I’m here to shoot
(I visited before it gets too crowded) It's right after the break and before supper,
which is why I chose this time
The restaurant's name is "Tonpachi"
It's a 47-year-old restaurant
Look, there's already a line over there
(Popular among locals) Local Nagoya residents
and tourists visit here a lot
Let's go inside

(The inside is cozy and clean) Oh, I love the atmosphere!
It's only been...
(Current time 17:02) two minutes after reopening, and it's already full
(Ordering six items before it gets too crowded)
Can you really eat all of that?
I'll be fine, haha
- They weigh 1kg in total... - Oh, 1kg?
Amazing...
- How can she eat all of that herself...? - I can't
Are you a mukbang YouTuber?
- 11.9 million subscribers? - (For real?)
Wow...
I've had Miso Katsu at several places before,
but this was the best that I've had
I'll try it
The combo meal originally includes cucumbers,

but I asked to exclude them because I can't eat cucumbers
This is the basic!
Large Miso Katsu
This one is the small version, and this is the large one
The large one is really thick
Time to eat!
Oh, so delicious!
It's so good
It's a bit different from Korean doenjang
A little sweet
Think and soft,
with a lot of juice! So tasty
Really good
Seriously
The one who recommended here said,
"Did they really give permission?!"

We didn't know...
We didn't expect it...!
Once Koreans get to know this place,
they will surely love it
I can definitely taste the miso,
but it's not too strong to cause aversion
There's a slight miso taste,
and it's a little creamy, too
To be honest, the Miso Katsu from other places were good, too
I really enjoyed them,
but they just tasted so typical
(A taste like no other) I have never tasted anything like this before
Miso soup
Delicious
The miso is delicious,
so the soup is so rich

Same sauce, but different cut
Hirekatsu is made from tenderloin
Even though I prefer tenderloin,
today's best goes to the sirloin! It's so good!
I mean...
The owner has run this place for a long time,
(For 50 years,) but he does all the cooking!
(the owner has been the chef) So it takes some time for the food to be served
Only my table and the other one were served
Sorry, I ordered too much...
Excuse me!
Is this a famous Miso Katsu place?
It's famous
Thanks!
Time for the gyukatsu!
It's a deep-fried beef cutlet

Very delicious
Haha
You know?
Your Korean accent has begun to include a Japanese lilt
"Very delicious"
The gyukatsu is...
so tasty that it's melting in my mouth
However,
among the three,
the sirloin is the winner
Nagoya is renowned for its miso,
(Their akamiso is famous!) which is red, unlike the usual one
The miso is very rich and funky
These shrimp are plump
Since I've tried enough of miso sauce, I'll try the demi-glace one
Time to try the normal sauce

So good
It's like a mixture of tomato sauce and tonkatsu sauce
This one's really tasty
Sad to see them disappear...
I have to eat quickly as there's a long queue
Need to finish them quickly
I have no choice!
(Speedy mukbang for those who are waiting)
(She's really eating them all...?)
Originally, cabbage is served in much larger portions
I asked them to give a small portion for me
Even the cabbage is sweet, why is that?
Cabbage is in season now
Oh, cabbage is in season?
Scrumptious
Are you eating this all by yourself?

(Yes)
Ah, amazing!
Is it good?
Super good!
What's your YouTube channel?
Tzuyang
I'll subscribe
- (Greetings from Singapore) - Hello
I'm so sad to see them go away
Haha
She ate 10 bowls of ramen yesterday
Awesome
(The cheese hamburg steak has gone cold) I wanted to eat this while the cheese was still warm
I asked to pack this to eat later at the hotel,
and ordered a new one
(I'll enjoy this moment) When will I ever come back?

Shouldn't I eat the steak when it is at its best?
(Cheese hamburg steak) Freshly served, must be so nice
The taste is incredible...
The sauce is very good
Very well-balanced,
and the meat can't be softer
I think the sauce will go better with the tonkatsu,
but this steak is good, too
It literally melts in your mouth
I can chew it with my gum
(A round of applause for finishing everything)
Thank you
(I wanted to order other dishes, but the restaurant is busy until late at night)
It's okay!
The owner said I could order more,
so I ordered one other dish!

There's a dish made of soy sauce
Aren't you all curious?
(Grilled sirloin with soy sauce)
Bon appétit!
Are you a mukbang YouTuber?
You're so cute!
I thought it'd be a tonkatsu, but it's not
Slightly disappointed, but I'll eat it anyway
It's good
I thought it'd be thin yakiniku, but it's quite thick
The texture is chewy,
and the soy sauce is a bit salty yet delicious
I love the savoriness
Very nice
I've had a wonderful meal
(It was an honor to film at this restaurant that always has a line all day long...!)

I loved all the places I've visited,
but I particularly enjoyed this one
When you come to Nagoya,
it'd be nice to try out their miso dishes
Once again, I enjoyed today's meal!
I can't believe it
(I truly enjoyed the Miso Katsu with 50 years of history!)
(Japan - Nagoya)
(EP 1. 4kg Ramen Challenge)
(EP 2. Conveyor Belt Sushi)
(EP 3. Yakiniku)
(EP 4. Iroriyaki)
(EP 5. Street Cart Ramen)
(EP 6. Street Food)
(EP 7. Miso Katsu)
(From EP 1. "Menya Hanabi") (The people that I met in Nagoya)

(Even though it was a short visit,)
(From EP 2. "Sushi Honke")
(From EP 3. "Jeongnakwon") (I made so many good memories)
(From EP 4. "Yanagiya")
(From EP 5. "Ramen Yamu Yamu")
(From EP 6. Osu Shopping Street)
(From EP 7. "Tonpachi")
(Thanks to everyone for enjoying the Japan mukbang series!) I had a great meal
